Module com.lulow.justtype
Package com.lulow.justtype.view

Class Theme

java.lang.Object
com.lulow.justtype.view.Theme
public final class Theme extends Object
Central color palette and hex-conversion utility for the application's visual theme. All colors are defined as constants to ensure consistency across the UI.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final javafx.scene.paint.Color
    COLOR_ACCENT
    Primary accent color (teal).
    static final javafx.scene.paint.Color
    COLOR_BASE
    Base background color (near black).
    static final javafx.scene.paint.Color
    COLOR_DANGER
    Danger/error color (red).
    static final javafx.scene.paint.Color
    COLOR_WHITE
    Pure white, used for char labels and effects.
    static final javafx.scene.paint.Color[]
    CONFETTI_PALETTE
    Color palette used for colorful confetti on the win screen.
    static final javafx.scene.paint.Color
    GRADIENT_EASY
    Background gradient bottom color for the EASY tier.
    static final javafx.scene.paint.Color
    GRADIENT_EXPERT
    Background gradient bottom color for the EXPERT tier.

    GRADIENT_HARD
    Background gradient bottom color for the HARD tier.
    static final javafx.scene.paint.Color
    GRADIENT_MEDIUM
    Background gradient bottom color for the MEDIUM tier.
    static final String
    HEX_BASE
    Hex string of the base background color, used for inline CSS gradients.

  • Method Details

    • toHex

      public static String toHex(javafx.scene.paint.Color color)
      Converts a JavaFX Color to an uppercase hex string (e.g. "#FF4C4C").
      Parameters:
      color - the color to convert
      Returns:
      a CSS-compatible hex color string
